items.speaker: guan_yu
items.text: Wine, fast — I'm heading in to enlist.

items.speaker: liu_bei
items.text: Friend — sit and drink with us.

items.speaker: narrator
items.text: Three men knelt before heaven and earth. They became brothers.

items.speaker: all
items.text: Not born on the same day — but we swear to die on the same day.

items.speaker: merchant
items.text: Fifty horses, five hundred taels of silver, a thousand jin of iron — all yours.

items.speaker: narrator
items.text: Five hundred men. Three brothers. One road ahead.
